acceptance_criteria: AC1: Contract test verifies command contains output instructions for each skill artifact (pattern + path)
AC2: Test catches known tdd/test-design integration-test gap
AC3: Malformed registry produces parse error naming skill
AC4: Phase 5 verification step in commands/implement.md
AC5: Phase 3 verification step in commands/test-design.md
AC6: Registry format: Markdown table with Artifact|Pattern|Path|Condition columns
AC7: Skills with no Required Artifacts section pass
AC8: Conditional artifacts: full pattern+path check (not relaxed — Condition column is informational only)
AC9: Multiple output paths: passes if at least one matches
AC10: No regression on existing tests
AC11: Negative test fixture with mock skill+command and known gap
known_risks: Missing Call Chain in arch doc — integration target chosen by QA
